title: lobostemon collinus
intro: Lobostemon collinus, also known as the blue devil or blue lobostemon, is a flowering plant native to the Western Cape Province of South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory conditions, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Lobostemon collinus is often used as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional remedies for various health issues.
